summary: Screenshots your site every 5 minutes from inside a mobile TEE and delivers it to your own Telegram bot.
description: An Acurast app that, on a fixed 5-minute tick, renders a user-given URL **entirely inside the device WebView** (via Chrome DevTools Protocol), captures a PNG, and sends it to **your own Telegram bot** with a status caption (HTTP status, latency, timestamp). No PROOF bot and no provider secret — you supply the host plus your own bot token and chat id. The whole screenshot path runs in-job, with no dependency on Liskov or any external service beyond launch.

telegramBotToken.label: Telegram bot token
telegramBotToken.description: Your own bot token from BotFather (sealed via Lockbox; never stored in plaintext).

telegramChatId.label: Telegram chat ID
telegramChatId.description: Your numeric chat id (after you /start your own bot).
